examples: The fearless rodent proved he was no scaredy-cat as he astonishingly squared up to his large opponent and refused to budge.
A year from now (or less if you're not such a scaredy-cat like I was), you just might not be imagining that loving the morning scenario anymore.
Children might call a child who is easily frightened a fraidy cat or a scaredy cat .
They were also scaredy-cats trying to hold on to their jobs.
I'm a wee bit of a scaredy cat in public, really and truly I am, but there is no safer place in the world than that wee stage.
